summary: Iteration 65 - Franchise Dashboard Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 4 reported bugs verified as FIXED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All KPI cards, club comparison, and ad budget table displaying correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 franchise dashboard bugs are now fixed and verified. Members (96) and Coaches (24) are displayed separately. ROAS shows 9.09x. Meta metrics (impressions: 95413, clicks: 2024, CPC: 0.59 CHF) are visible in the ad budget table for Transform Versoix.

bug_1_text_overflow.description: KPI cards now have overflow:hidden and text-overflow:ellipsis CSS properties
bug_1_text_overflow.evidence: Visual inspection shows text contained within card bounds

bug_2_members_coaches_combined.description: Members and Coaches are now shown separately (was 120 combined)
bug_2_members_coaches_combined.evidence: API returns total_members=96, coach_members=24. UI shows 'Membres: 96' and 'Coachs: 24' cards

bug_4_missing_meta_metrics.description: Meta metrics (impressions, clicks, CPC) now visible in ad budget table
bug_4_missing_meta_metrics.evidence: Transform Versoix row shows: Impressions=95413, Clicks=2024, CPC=0.59 CHF
